text_block_list.text:
One morning, I notice Narita Taishin<n>talking to
someone in front of her<n>dorm.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Anyway, take care, Taishin! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Actually, wait. You said you sprained<n>your ankle,
didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And didn't you mention that you're<n>out of your
favorite medical tape?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I'm fine. It's nothing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Later.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, it's you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: My roommate, Super Creek. You<n>know her?
choice_data_list: Sort of. Are you two close?
Sort of. Are you two close?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Does it seem that way? I guess<n>we're closer than
we used to be.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: We fought a lot when we first met.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Taishin, you're such a good<n>Umamusume! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are you making fun of me?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Of course not! Now, don't be shy<n>and—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Get away! Just leave me alone!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What? Oh... I, uh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
We barely spoke to each other after<n>that, but then
we started chatting a<n>tiny bit from then on.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And now we're here, I guess.
choice_data_list: So you two hashed it out?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Not really. I just put up with her. She<n>does all sorts
of stuff in our room, but<n>it's not like it bugs me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
And it's not like I wanna get into<n>fights or
anything. Anyway, aren't we<n>supposed to go
train?
That night...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you. Got a moment? Creek<n>hasn't come
home yet.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if she's okay. It's not like I<n>care since
we're not friends or<n>anything, but still...
choice_data_list: We should go look for her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right. It'd be a pain if<n>she's in
trouble or something, so I<n>guess we should.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Someone's coming. Is that...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I was the one who said I'dtag along on yer shoppin' trip, butI'm barely holdin' it together.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yer just buyin' everyday things.<n>Why'd ya hafta
be so picky? You<n>shoulda just got whatever.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That won't do! Our little Umamusume<n>is a delicate
flower.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I pick one thing that really suits her,<n>then
camouflage it with a few other<n>items that make it
seem like I didn't<n>try.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whadda pain in the butt. Yer gonna<n>exhaust
yerself walkin' on eggshells<n>like that.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Why don'tcha just lay it all out and<n>be straight
with her?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: No, it's better not to rush things.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It might take some time, but this is the<n>right pace
for our friendship.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure one day, I'll be able to see<n>her real
smile.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh, you got the patience of a saint.<n>Is that the
super caring friend thing?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Trainer, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I thought it was normal, but it turns<n>out to be the
opposite...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Listen, I...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Never mind. I was just thinking I've<n>still got a lot
of growing up to do,<n>that's all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll wait here, then.
choice_data_list: Why don't you wait in your room?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm staying here. You can go back<n>to your
place if you want.
choice_data_list: It's okay. I'll wait with you.
It's okay. I'll wait with you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Suit yourself. Keep a lookout that way,<n>then.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, I didn't mean to be out this<n>late.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Taishin? Were you waiting for me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: As if. I just happened to be here.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. I couldn't find any medical tape<n>in the dorm,
so I went out to search<n>for some.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: And I found your favorite one! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Medical tape? For me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't even need it! Ugh, you're<n>such a
busybody.
But, Taishin...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter if you get home late<n>because of
me. I don't want that<n>crap.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Give it to my trainer or something.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Bye.
Taishin...
The next day...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Trainer. Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Gimme that tape. It's not like you<n>need it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
She got it for me, so I'll take it—as<n>payment for
having to wait outside<n>last night.
